full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #37 (2026-05-20)

PULSE
Health: 0.5677 (C). 1015 wallets, 274 contributors. 90 memos today vs 171 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
91 reward payments, 393919 PFT distributed to 25 contributors. Top earner: raL2kv...Gwzd (86785 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 8,200 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (8,200 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (42,900 PFT, avg 8,580/day over 5 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rMA69k...rcQK (100 memos). Fastest new contributor: rhwiJx...2TaE (39.0 memos/day in 2 days). 87 new wallet(s) this week. 36 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 72.2%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-20): 200 transactions from 32 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
